content.text: The capital of France is Paris. Paris is not only the capital but also the largest city in France. It is situated in the northern central part of the country, along the Seine River. Paris is renowned for its rich history, culture, and landmarks. Some of its most famous attractions include the Eiffel Tower, the Louvre Museum, Notre-Dame Cathedral, and the Champs-Élysées. It is a major global city and a hub for art, fashion, gastronomy, and diplomacy. Paris is divided into 20 arrondissements (municipalities), each with its own unique character and attractions. The city is also known for its significant contributions to various fields such as philosophy, science, and literature.
